title: Dynamic Alerting Platform — Tenant Configuration Schema
description: JSON Schema (draft-07) for validating tenant YAML configuration files in conf.d/. Supports threshold customization, alert routing, maintenance windows, and metadata injection.

tenants.title: Tenant Configuration Map
tenants.description: Mapping of tenant-id (string) to per-tenant configuration (object). Each tenant can define thresholds, routing, metadata, and operational modes.

tenantConfig.title: Per-Tenant Configuration
tenantConfig.description: Configuration for a single tenant. Supports metric thresholds (from Rule Packs), operational modes (_state_*, _silent_mode), routing, metadata, and scheduled overrides.

_profile.title: Profile Reference (v1.12.0)
_profile.description: Reference to a profile name defined in _profiles.yaml. Profile values act as fill-in (not overwrite) — tenant settings take precedence. Inheritance chain: _defaults.yaml → profile → tenant config.

_metadata.title: Tenant Metadata
_metadata.description: Optional metadata fields injected into all alert annotations. Exposed as tenant_metadata_info{tenant, runbook_url, owner, tier} = 1 metric. Supports {{tenant}} placeholder in runbook_url.

_silent_mode.title: Silent Mode Configuration
_silent_mode.description: Suppress Alertmanager notifications while keeping TSDB records. Alerts still fire and are recorded, but notifications are blocked. Useful for transient noisy alerts during known issues.

_state_maintenance.title: Maintenance Mode Configuration
_state_maintenance.description: Suppress alerts at PromQL level (no TSDB records). Useful for planned maintenance windows. Supports one-time expiry and recurring schedules (v1.11.0). Distinct from silent_mode.

_severity_dedup.title: Severity Deduplication Mode
_severity_dedup.description: Controls Alertmanager inhibition behavior for multi-severity alerts. Values: 'auto' (default), 'manual', 'disable'. See architecture-and-design.md §2.8 for details.

_namespaces.title: Kubernetes Namespaces (N:1 Tenant Mapping)
_namespaces.description: List of Kubernetes namespaces this tenant maps to. Used by scaffold_tenant.py and da-tools N:1 mapping tooling (v1.8.0+). See architecture-and-design.md §2.3.

_routing_profile.title: Routing Profile Reference (v2.1.0 ADR-007)
_routing_profile.description: Reference to a named routing profile defined in _routing_profiles.yaml. Profile values act as Layer 2 in the four-layer merge: _routing_defaults → routing_profiles[ref] → tenant _routing → _routing_enforced. Tenant _routing keys override profile values.

_routing.title: Alert Routing Configuration
_routing.description: Per-tenant alert routing to custom receivers (webhook, email, slack, teams, rocketchat, pagerduty). Supports per-alertname and metric_group overrides. Tenant routing is inserted after _routing_enforced.

_routing_enforced.title: Platform-Enforced Dual Routing (v1.13.0)
_routing_enforced.description: Platform-level dual-perspective routing. Inserted before tenant routes with continue: true. NOC receives platform_summary annotation. See architecture-and-design.md §2.11 and scenarios/alert-routing-split.md.

_routing_defaults.title: Routing Defaults (v1.4.0+)
_routing_defaults.description: Default routing config for tenants without explicit _routing. Supports {{tenant}} placeholder for per-tenant dynamic values. Typically set in _defaults.yaml, not per-tenant.

_operator.title: Operator CRD Settings (v2.6.0)
_operator.description: Per-tenant Operator mode overrides. Used by operator-generate and migrate-to-operator tools.

^[a-z_][a-z0-9_]*\\{.*\\}$.title: Dimensional Threshold
^[a-z_][a-z0-9_]*\\{.*\\}$.description: Metric with dimensional labels: metric{label="value"} or metric{label=~"regex"}. Labels can be literal (=) or regex (=~). Examples: redis_queue_length{queue="orders"}, mysql_connections{schema=~"temp.*"}

thresholdScalar.title: Threshold Value (Scalar)
thresholdScalar.description: Simple string threshold. Values: numeric threshold (e.g., '70'), 'disable' (stop alerting), or 'value:severity' (e.g., '1000:critical'). Three-state design: custom value, omit (use default), or 'disable'.

scheduledValue.title: Scheduled Threshold with Time-Window Overrides
scheduledValue.description: Structured threshold with default and optional time-window overrides (v1.11.0 B4). Allows different thresholds at different UTC times. Supports cross-midnight windows (e.g., 22:00-06:00). See architecture-and-design.md §2.5.

default.title: Default Threshold Value
default.description: Default threshold applied outside any override window.

overrides.title: Time-Window Overrides
overrides.description: List of UTC time windows with override values. First matching window wins. Matched as HH:MM-HH:MM (24-hour format, UTC-only). Supports cross-midnight (e.g., 22:00-06:00 = 10PM to 6AM).

timeWindowOverride.title: Time-Window Override
timeWindowOverride.description: Override threshold value for a specific UTC time window (HH:MM-HH:MM format, 24-hour).

window.title: UTC Time Window
window.description: Window in HH:MM-HH:MM format (24-hour, UTC-only). Example: '01:00-09:00' (1AM to 9AM). Supports cross-midnight (e.g., '22:00-06:00' = 10PM to 6AM).

value.title: Override Threshold Value
value.description: Threshold value to use within this window. Same syntax as scalar thresholds (numeric, 'disable', or 'value:severity').

metadata.title: Tenant Metadata
metadata.description: Optional metadata injected into all alerts from this tenant. Exposed as tenant_metadata_info{tenant, runbook_url, owner, tier} = 1 metric. Supports {{tenant}} placeholder.
metadata.$comment: v2.7.0 ADR-017: When files are in hierarchical conf.d/ (domain/region/env/), the directory path infers default values for domain, region, and environment. Explicit _metadata fields override path-inferred values. CI may warn when path and field disagree.

runbook_url.title: Runbook URL
runbook_url.description: Base URL to tenant-specific runbooks/documentation. Supports {{tenant}} placeholder. Example: 'https://wiki.example.com/{{tenant}}'

owner.title: Owner/Team
owner.description: Team or person responsible for this tenant's monitoring. Free-form string for annotation purposes.

tier.title: Business Tier
tier.description: Business tier/SLA level for prioritization. Examples: tier-1, tier-2, non-critical.

environment.title: Environment
environment.description: Deployment environment for RBAC filtering. Examples: production, staging, development.

region.title: Region
region.description: Geographic region or data center for this tenant.

domain.title: Business Domain
domain.description: Business domain for RBAC filtering and grouping. Examples: finance, ecommerce, infrastructure.

db_type.title: Database Type
db_type.description: Primary database type for this tenant. Used for dimension-based grouping.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Free-form tags for flexible categorization and filtering.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Group membership references. Groups are defined in _groups.yaml.

oneOf.title: Silent Mode (Scalar, Backward Compatible)
oneOf.description: Legacy scalar format: 'warning', 'critical', 'all', or 'disable'. For new configs, prefer structured format with expires/reason.

oneOf.title: Silent Mode (Structured, v1.7.0+)
oneOf.description: Structured format with optional expiry and reason. Alerts fire but Alertmanager suppresses notifications. Distinct from maintenance mode which suppresses at PromQL level.

target.title: Target Severity
target.description: Which severity levels to suppress: 'warning', 'critical', or 'all'.

expires.title: Expiration Timestamp (ISO 8601)
expires.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Silent mode auto-expires at this time. Optional; omit for indefinite silent mode.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Human-readable reason for silent mode. Optional; appears in observability logs.

maintenanceMode.title: Maintenance Mode Configuration
maintenanceMode.description: Suppress alerts at PromQL level (no TSDB records). Useful for planned maintenance. Supports one-time expiry and recurring schedules (cron). Distinct from silent_mode.

target.title: Target
target.description: Status: 'enable' (default) or 'disable'. When 'disable', maintenance mode is inactive.

enabled.title: Enabled Flag
enabled.description: Boolean equivalent of target field. true = 'enable', false = 'disable'. Use either 'target' (string) or 'enabled' (boolean).

expires.title: Expiration Timestamp (ISO 8601)
expires.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Maintenance mode auto-expires at this time. Optional; omit for indefinite maintenance.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Human-readable reason for maintenance. Optional; appears in observability logs.

recurring.title: Recurring Maintenance Windows (v1.11.0+)
recurring.description: List of periodic maintenance schedules (e.g., weekly backups). Processed by maintenance_scheduler.py CronJob to auto-generate Alertmanager silences.

recurringSchedule.title: Recurring Schedule
recurringSchedule.description: Periodic maintenance window defined by cron expression and duration. Processed by maintenance_scheduler.py to auto-generate Alertmanager silences. See docs/architecture-and-design.md §2.7.

cron.title: Cron Expression
cron.description: Standard 5-field cron (minute hour dayOfMonth month dayOfWeek) in UTC. Examples: '0 2 * * *' (daily 2AM), '0 3 * * 0' (Sunday 3AM).

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: Go-style duration (e.g., '4h', '30m', '2h30m'). Maintenance window = cron start time + duration.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Human-readable reason for recurring maintenance. Optional.

routing.title: Alert Routing Configuration
routing.description: Per-tenant alert routing to custom receivers. Supports one primary receiver and per-alertname/metric_group overrides. Replaces _routing_defaults. See architecture-and-design.md §2.9 and cli-reference.md.

receiver.title: Primary Receiver
receiver.description: Default receiver for alerts from this tenant. Can be webhook, email, slack, teams, rocketchat, or pagerduty.

group_by.title: Group By Labels
group_by.description: Alertmanager grouping labels (e.g., ['alertname', 'tenant']). Optional; defaults to Alertmanager config.

group_wait.title: Group Wait Duration
group_wait.description: Wait time before sending initial notification (Go duration, e.g., '30s'). Guardrail: 5s–5m. See architecture-and-design.md §2.9.

group_interval.title: Group Interval Duration
group_interval.description: Interval between notifications for same group (Go duration, e.g., '5m'). Guardrail: 5s–5m. See architecture-and-design.md §2.9.

repeat_interval.title: Repeat Interval Duration
repeat_interval.description: Interval for re-sending unresolved alerts (Go duration, e.g., '4h'). Guardrail: 1m–72h. See architecture-and-design.md §2.9.

overrides.title: Per-Alertname/Metric-Group Overrides
overrides.description: List of routing overrides for specific alert names or metric groups. First matching override wins. See architecture-and-design.md §2.9.

receiver.title: Receiver Configuration
receiver.description: Alert receiver definition. Must specify 'type' and required fields based on type. See cli-reference.md for field details.

webhookReceiver.title: Webhook Receiver
webhookReceiver.description: Generic HTTP POST receiver. Sends alert to a webhook URL. Supports optional HTTP config.

url.title: Webhook URL
url.description: HTTP endpoint to POST alerts to. Subject to webhook domain allowlist policy (if configured).

send_resolved.title: Send Resolved
send_resolved.description: Whether to send alert resolved notifications. Default: true.

http_config.title: HTTP Configuration
http_config.description: Optional HTTP client settings (auth, TLS, proxy). See Alertmanager http_config docs.

emailReceiver.title: Email Receiver
emailReceiver.description: SMTP email receiver. Sends alerts via email to specified recipients.

to.title: Recipient Email Addresses
to.description: List of email addresses to send alerts to.

smarthost.title: SMTP Server
smarthost.description: SMTP server address in host:port format. Example: 'smtp.example.com:587'

from.title: From Address
from.description: Sender email address. Default: Alertmanager config.

auth_password.title: SMTP Password
auth_password.description: Password for SMTP authentication. Optional. Use Kubernetes Secrets in production.

require_tls.title: Require TLS
require_tls.description: Require TLS for SMTP connection. Default: true.

html.title: HTML Template
html.description: Alertmanager template for HTML email body. Optional; uses Alertmanager default if omitted.

send_resolved.title: Send Resolved
send_resolved.description: Whether to send resolved notifications. Default: true.

slackReceiver.title: Slack Receiver
slackReceiver.description: Slack webhook receiver. Posts alerts to a Slack channel.

api_url.title: Slack Webhook URL
api_url.description: Slack incoming webhook URL. Create at https://api.slack.com/messaging/webhooks

channel.title: Slack Channel
channel.description: Channel to post to (optional; defaults to webhook's configured channel). Example: '#alerts' or '#my-team'

title.title: Message Title
title.description: Custom title/heading for Slack message. Alertmanager template string (e.g., '{{ .GroupLabels.alertname }}').

text.title: Message Body
text.description: Custom body text for Slack message. Alertmanager template string.

send_resolved.title: Send Resolved
send_resolved.description: Whether to send resolved notifications. Default: true.

teamsReceiver.title: Microsoft Teams Receiver
teamsReceiver.description: Microsoft Teams webhook receiver. Posts alerts to Teams channel.

webhook_url.title: Teams Webhook URL
webhook_url.description: Microsoft Teams incoming webhook URL. Create at https://outlook.webhook.office.com

title.title: Card Title
title.description: Custom title for Teams card. Alertmanager template string.

text.title: Card Text
text.description: Custom body text for Teams card. Alertmanager template string.

send_resolved.title: Send Resolved
send_resolved.description: Whether to send resolved notifications. Default: true.

rocketchatReceiver.title: Rocket.Chat Receiver
rocketchatReceiver.description: Rocket.Chat webhook receiver. Posts alerts to Rocket.Chat channel.

channel.title: Channel
channel.description: Channel name. Metadata field (not passed to Alertmanager).

username.title: Bot Username
username.description: Bot username for posting. Metadata field (not passed to Alertmanager).

icon_url.title: Icon URL
icon_url.description: Icon URL for bot avatar. Metadata field (not passed to Alertmanager).

send_resolved.title: Send Resolved
send_resolved.description: Whether to send resolved notifications. Default: true.

pagerdutReceiver.title: PagerDuty Receiver
pagerdutReceiver.description: PagerDuty incident receiver. Creates/resolves PagerDuty incidents.

service_key.title: Service Key (Integration Key)
service_key.description: PagerDuty service integration key for events API v1. Deprecated in favor of routing_key (v2).

routing_key.title: Routing Key (v2 API)
routing_key.description: PagerDuty integration key for events API v2. Recommended over service_key.

severity.title: Severity Mapping
severity.description: PagerDuty severity level. Alertmanager template string (e.g., '{{ .Status }}'). Default: 'error'.

description.title: Incident Description
description.description: Custom incident description. Alertmanager template string.

client.title: Client Name
client.description: Monitoring tool name. Alertmanager template string (e.g., 'Prometheus').

client_url.title: Client URL
client_url.description: Link back to monitoring system. Alertmanager template string.

send_resolved.title: Send Resolved
send_resolved.description: Whether to resolve PagerDuty incidents on alert resolution. Default: true.

httpConfig.title: HTTP Client Configuration
httpConfig.description: Optional HTTP client settings for webhook receiver (auth, TLS, proxy). See Alertmanager documentation.

routingOverride.title: Routing Override
routingOverride.description: Per-alertname or metric_group routing override. First matching override wins.

alertname.title: Alert Name
alertname.description: Alert rule name to match (e.g., 'HighConnections'). Mutually exclusive with metric_group.

metric_group.title: Metric Group
metric_group.description: Metric group to match (e.g., 'mysql_connections'). Mutually exclusive with alertname.

receiver.title: Override Receiver
receiver.description: Receiver for alerts matching this override.

routingEnforced.title: Platform-Enforced Routing (v1.13.0+)
routingEnforced.description: Platform-level routing inserted before tenant routes. Enables dual-perspective alerts: NOC receives platform_summary, tenant receives summary. Inserted with continue: true so tenant routes also fire. See scenarios/alert-routing-split.md.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether to enable platform-enforced routing. Set to false or omit to disable.

receiver.title: NOC Receiver
receiver.description: Receiver for NOC (platform-perspective notifications). Usually a webhook to incident management system.

match.title: Match Conditions
match.description: List of Alertmanager label matchers (e.g., 'severity="critical"'). Alerts matching ANY condition are routed here.

routingDefaults.title: Routing Defaults (v1.4.0+)
routingDefaults.description: Default routing config for tenants without explicit _routing. Supports {{tenant}} placeholder for dynamic per-tenant values. Typically set in _defaults.yaml, not per-tenant.

receiver.title: Default Receiver
receiver.description: Default receiver for tenants. Receiver fields can use {{tenant}} placeholder.

operatorConfig.title: Operator CRD Settings (v2.6.0)
operatorConfig.description: Per-tenant Operator mode overrides. Used by operator-generate and migrate-to-operator tools.

receiver_template.title: Receiver Template Type
receiver_template.description: Receiver template type for AlertmanagerConfig generation

secret_name.title: K8s Secret Name
secret_name.description: K8s Secret name for receiver credentials (default: da-{tenant}-{type})

secret_key.title: Secret Key
secret_key.description: Key within K8s Secret (default: type-specific, e.g. webhook-url for slack)

service_monitor.title: ServiceMonitor Generation
service_monitor.description: Whether to generate ServiceMonitor for this tenant

defaultsConfig.title: _defaults.yaml Configuration (v2.7.0 ADR-018)
defaultsConfig.description: Schema for _defaults.yaml files placed at domain, region, or environment levels in hierarchical conf.d/. Values are deep-merged into all tenant configs under that directory. Merge semantics: dict=deep merge with child override, array=replace (not concat), null=opt-out (remove inherited key). _metadata fields are skipped during merge.
defaultsConfig.$comment: A _defaults.yaml at conf.d/finance/_defaults.yaml applies to all tenants under finance/. Deeper _defaults.yaml files override shallower ones (env > region > domain).

_metadata.description: Default metadata inherited by all tenants under this directory. Individual tenant _metadata fields override these defaults.

_routing.description: Default routing configuration inherited by all tenants under this directory.

_routing_profile.description: Default routing profile for tenants under this directory.

_silent_mode.description: Default silent mode inherited by all tenants under this directory.

_severity_dedup.description: Default severity dedup mode for tenants under this directory.
